$metadata.name: wndrfl Brand System
$metadata.format: W3C Design Tokens Community Group draft + Tokens Studio compatible

warm-gray-2.$description: PANTONE Warm Gray 2 C. CMYK: C17 M16 Y21 K0. RGB: 211/204/194. Primary background.

warm-gray-1.$description: PANTONE Warm Gray 1 C. CMYK: C13 M12 Y16 K0. RGB: 221/215/206. Secondary background.

cool-gray-1.$description: PANTONE Cool Gray 1 C. CMYK: C9 M9 Y9 K0. RGB: 229/225/223. Tertiary neutral.

black.$description: PANTONE Black 6 C. CMYK: C0 M0 Y0 K100. Primary text and logo on light.

white.$description: White. Reversal only. Logo and text on dark or photographic backgrounds. Not a named palette color.

primary.$description: Primary background surface. Use for main canvas.

secondary.$description: Secondary background surface. Use for cards, inset panels.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary background surface. Use for subtle divisions.

dark.$description: Dark background. Use for full-bleed dark sections.

on-light.$description: Text and logo color on any light surface.

on-dark.$description: Text and logo color on dark surface or photography.

default.$description: Divider lines, spine lines, ruled separators on light.

on-dark.$description: Divider lines and spine lines on dark or photography.

heading.$description: Primary heading font. Production: ITC Garamond Std Light Narrow. Web fallback: EB Garamond.

body.$description: Body, labels, metadata. Production: GT Pressura Mono Light. Web fallback: Space Mono.

heading.$description: Light weight — only weight in use for ITC Garamond Std Light Narrow.

body.$description: Light weight — only weight in use for GT Pressura Mono Light.

display.$description: Event/display headline. ITC Garamond Italic. At 1080px canvas base.

brand-phrase.$description: [Subject] is wndrfl pattern. ITC Garamond upright. At 1080px canvas base.

sub-brand.$description: MOMENTUM / ODYSSEY / JOURNEY / SHELTER label. GT Pressura Mono tracked uppercase.

date-location.$description: Date and location fields. GT Pressura Mono.

url.$description: wndrfl.com footer URL. GT Pressura Mono. Opacity 40%.

sub-brand.$description: Sub-brand label tracking. Range: 0.28–0.35em depending on lockup.

heading.$description: Tight line height for display headlines.

dot-on-photo.$description: Dot trail elements on photography. Range: 30–45%.

post-width-pct.$description: Logotype width on 1080×1350 post canvas. Range: 18–22% canvas width.

story-width-pct.$description: Logotype width on 1080×1920 story canvas. Range: 20–25%.

master-width-pct.$description: Logotype width on 2560×1440 master canvas. Range: 12–15%.

min-width.$description: Absolute minimum logotype width in digital applications.

symbol-min-diameter.$description: Absolute minimum symbol diameter in digital applications.

dot-size-min.$description: Minimum dot diameter in dot trail compositions.

dot-size-max.$description: Maximum dot diameter in dot trail compositions.

dot-gap-min.$description: Minimum gap between dots in a trail.

dot-gap-max.$description: Maximum gap between dots in a trail.

spine-dot-marker.$description: Circular dot markers on vertical spine. ~7px diameter.

out.$description: Ease-out. Use for elements entering the screen.
